data.text: LI+ ION EMITTING S05 WITH ONE QUARTZ PLANET. I FOUND MYSELF IN PITCH
BLACK AFTER A 3K LY JUMP ON THE Y AXIS FROM PLANARIS ALPHA. THIS WAS
THE ONLY STAR IN THE NEIGHBORHOOD BUT WITH THE STARFIELD AMPLIFICATOR
ON, I SAW AT LEAST OTHER SIX SYSTEMS AROUND HERE. I'M GOING TO TRY
TO MAP THE ZONE. (NOTES BY NEUZD, 6011:789.882)
